sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ هُوَ مَهَارَةٌ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja je veoma važna vještina u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming is a very important skill in this age.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الْمُبَرْمِجُونَ رُمُوزًا خَاصَّةً لِصِنَاعَةِ مَوَاقِعِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Programeri pišu posebne kodove za izradu web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: Programmers write special codes to create websites.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِهْنَةُ الشَّبَابَ عَلَى الْإِبْدَاعِ وَالِابْتِكَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ova profesija pomaže mladima da budu kreativni i inovativni.
sentences.translationEn: This profession helps young people to be creative and innovative.
